query: SELECT ct.id, ct.fila, ct.status, c.razaoSocial as clienteNome, c.cnpj as clienteCnpj, p.nomeCompleto as parceiroNome FROM credit_tasks ct LEFT JOIN clientes c ON ct.clienteId = c.id LEFT JOIN credit_cases cc ON ct.caseId = cc.id LEFT JOIN parceiros p ON cc.parceiroId = p.id WHERE ct.fila = 'apuracao' ORDER BY ct.ordem ASC, ct.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5
